response.justification: Strong senior full-stack profile with 13+ years of experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Current role at Stripe involves the exact stack (TypeScript/Node.js) plus AI-agent infrastructure and MCP work, directly matching the AI agent development requirement. Solid background in TDD, CI/CD, and craftsmanship practices. Main gaps are limited explicit Nest.js experience and React depth is present but not deeply emphasized; Vitest specifically isn't mentioned though testing expertise is evident.
strengths: Current Stripe role covers TypeScript/Node.js plus AI-agent/MCP infrastructure work
13+ years across full stack with multiple languages (TS, Java, DLang, C++, Python-adjacent)
Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Vitest specifically not listed though other testing experience is evident
Some resume inconsistencies (Datadog listed as 'Founder' for an open-source GIS project is confusing)

key_factors.factor: AI agent / MCP experience at Stripe
